items.name: Storage Box
items.description: A basic wooden storage box for stashing spare materials around the workshop.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.

items.name: Big Storage Box
items.description: A triple-capacity storage box built from reinforced Pokemetal panels.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.
items.notes: Unlock condition uncertain — one source lists a 30-Pokémon registration gate instead of a plain workbench unlock.

items.name: Plain Chest
items.description: A simple lidded chest bound with twine, useful for extra storage in any room.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench; also occasionally found in Bleak Beach.

items.name: Office Cabinet
items.description: A metal filing cabinet suited to tidy, businesslike interiors.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.

items.name: Gaming Fridge
items.description: A mini fridge with a glass door, built to keep drinks cold beside a gaming setup.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.
items.notes: Obtain method uncertain — one source lists this as a shop purchase after reaching Environment Level 10 in Sparkling Skylands rather than a craft recipe.

items.name: Poké Ball Chest
items.description: A chest styled after a Poké Ball, assembled from iron and Pokemetal plating.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.

items.name: Antique Chest
items.description: A weathered wooden chest reinforced with iron banding and twine lashings.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench; also found or traded for.

items.name: Plain Closet
items.description: A modest wooden closet for hanging clothes and storing linens.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.

items.name: Antique Closet
items.description: A large antique closet with iron fittings, built for serious storage.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench; also found, traded, or given by Vespiquen.

items.name: Office Shelf
items.description: A glass-fronted metal shelving unit for displaying office supplies.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.

items.name: Straw Table
items.description: A low table topped with woven leaves over a stone base.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.

items.name: Log Table
items.description: A simple table cut straight from a single small log.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench, available from the first time it is used.

items.name: Side Table
items.description: A compact stone-and-iron side table for placing beside a bed or sofa.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench; also found near Bleak Beach.

items.name: Garden Table
items.description: An outdoor table forged from iron ore, built to withstand the weather.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench; also found near Sparkling Skylands.

items.name: Iron Bed
items.description: A sturdy bed frame welded from iron ingots and topped with soft fluff bedding.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.

items.name: Luxury Bed
items.description: An opulent bed built from gold ingots, limestone, and plush fluff.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.
items.notes: Obtain method uncertain — one source lists this as a shop purchase after reaching Environment Level 10 in Rocky Ridges rather than a craft recipe.

items.name: Antique Bed
items.description: A retro-styled bed sold once the Palette Town shop reaches level 5.
items.obtainDetail: Palette Town shop, Environment Level 5.

items.name: Cute Bed
items.description: A canopy bed with a heart motif, sold at the Bleak Beach shop.
items.obtainDetail: Bleak Beach shop, Environment Level 10.

items.name: Berry Bed
items.description: A bed upholstered in a Pecha Berry print, sold in Withered Wasteland.
items.obtainDetail: Withered Wasteland shop, Environment Level 10.

items.name: Counter
items.description: A stackable, rotatable counter used to build custom shop and kitchen layouts.
items.obtainDetail: Palette Town shop, Environment Level 3.

items.name: Beach Chair
items.description: A folding beach chair that pairs naturally with a parasol.
items.obtainDetail: Found in the overworld or sold in shops.

items.name: Workbench
items.description: The central crafting station where raw materials become furniture, blocks, and décor.
items.obtainDetail: Built during the Pokémon Center construction questline.

items.name: Cash Register
items.description: A register that enables buying and selling goods once placed in a shop area.
items.obtainDetail: Found in the overworld or sold in shops.

items.name: Ceiling Fan
items.description: A ceiling-mounted fan that keeps a room's air circulating.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Concrete Mixer
items.description: A mixer for producing concrete, unlocked through a Conkeldurr with the Crush specialty.
items.obtainDetail: Given after talking to a Conkeldurr with the Crush specialty.

items.name: Community Box
items.description: A shared deposit box for storing and exchanging items.
items.obtainDetail: Withered Wasteland shop, Environment Level 4.

items.name: Cooking Pot
items.description: A pot found in Rocky Ridges, used for simmering soups.
items.obtainDetail: Found in Rocky Ridges.

items.name: Cooking Stove
items.description: A stove that provides the flame needed for cooked dishes.
items.obtainDetail: Found in the overworld or sold in shops.

items.name: Cutting Board
items.description: A prep board used for chopping ingredients before cooking.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or given by Chef Dente.

items.name: Bread Oven
items.description: An oven for baking bread, given to the player by Chef Dente.
items.obtainDetail: Given by Chef Dente.

items.name: CD Player
items.description: A CD player that fills a room with music once loaded with a disc.
items.obtainDetail: Sparkling Skylands shop, Environment Level 3.

items.name: Antique Chandelier
items.description: An ornate ceiling chandelier sold at the Palette Town shop.
items.obtainDetail: Palette Town shop, Environment Level 7.

items.name: Antique Clock
items.description: A chiming wall clock that marks the hour, sold in Palette Town.
items.obtainDetail: Palette Town shop, Environment Level 8.

items.name: Air Conditioner
items.description: A wall unit that keeps an interior cool.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Berry Hanging Lamp
items.description: A hanging lamp shaped like a Chesto Berry, sold in Withered Wasteland.
items.obtainDetail: Withered Wasteland shop, Environment Level 10.

items.name: Berry Table Lamp
items.description: A table lamp with a Rawst Berry glass shade, sold in Withered Wasteland.
items.obtainDetail: Withered Wasteland shop, Environment Level 9.

items.name: Blue Meteor Lamp
items.description: A rare lamp that casts a shooting-star glow across a room.
items.obtainDetail: Obtained through an uncommon, unconfirmed method.
items.notes: Obtain method uncertain — sources only mark this item as "other."

items.name: Chic Streetlight
items.description: A stylish streetlight for lining paths at night.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Cute Lamp
items.description: A lamp shaped like a glowing heart, sold at the Bleak Beach shop.
items.obtainDetail: Bleak Beach shop, Environment Level 9.

items.name: Desk Light
items.description: A focused desk lamp for lighting close work.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Double Streetlight
items.description: A streetlight fitted with two lamps for wider outdoor coverage.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Bonfire
items.description: A bonfire that provides warmth and light for outdoor gatherings.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Cannon
items.description: A decorative cannon that launches fireworks.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Campfire
items.description: A small gathered-stick campfire, one of the earliest outdoor items available.
items.obtainDetail: Given as an early reward or found in the overworld.

items.name: Driftwood
items.description: A weathered piece of driftwood washed up along the shore.
items.obtainDetail: Found in the overworld.

items.name: Beach Parasol
items.description: A parasol for shading a beachside seating area.
items.obtainDetail: Found in the overworld or sold as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Bell
items.description: A wall-mounted bell that chimes when rung.
items.obtainDetail: Included in a build kit or sold as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Leaf House Kit
items.description: A pre-built house kit styled with leafy, forest-green trim.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops.

items.name: Sand Den Kit
items.description: A pre-built den kit styled for sandy, coastal habitats.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops.

items.name: City Cottage Kit
items.description: A pre-built cottage kit sized to house two Pokémon.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops.

items.name: City Den Kit
items.description: A pre-built den kit suited to a medium-sized Pokémon.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops.

items.name: City House Kit
items.description: A large pre-built house kit meant for communal Pokémon living.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops.

items.name: City Hut Kit
items.description: A flexible pre-built hut kit usable by nearly any Pokémon.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops.

items.name: Concert Stage Kit
items.description: A pre-built stage kit for hosting Pokémon performances.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or included in a build kit set.

items.name: Charging Station Kit
items.description: A pre-built structure kit for charging Electric-type habitats.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops.

items.name: Abandoned Power Plant Kit
items.description: A pre-built structure kit modeled on a derelict Electric-type facility.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops.

items.name: Altar of Flame Kit
items.description: A pre-built altar structure themed around Fire-type habitats.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or included in a build kit set.

items.name: Beach Pokémon Center Kit
items.description: A pre-built kit that remodels a Pokémon Center for a beach setting.
items.obtainDetail: Unlocked through story progress.

items.name: Demolition Kit
items.description: A kit that clears away placed structures and blocks in one action.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops.

items.name: Simple Salad
items.description: A plain leaf salad, the most basic dish that powers up Leafage.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Leppa Salad
items.description: A leaf salad tossed with a Leppa Berry for a milder power-up.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Seaweed Salad
items.description: A leaf salad mixed with gathered seaweed.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Shredded Salad
items.description: A finely shredded leaf salad made using the Chop specialty.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen; requires the Chop specialty.

items.name: Crushed-Berry Salad
items.description: A leaf salad topped with a crushed Chesto Berry.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen; requires the Crush specialty.

items.name: Crouton Salad
items.description: A leaf salad finished with croutons torn from simple bread.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Simple Soup
items.description: A plain water-based soup, the most basic dish that powers up Water Gun.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Seaweed Soup
items.description: A water soup simmered with seaweed.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Mushroom Soup
items.description: A water soup simmered with cave mushrooms.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Electrifying Soup
items.description: A water soup charged using the Generate specialty.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen; requires the Generate specialty.

items.name: Healthy Soup
items.description: A water soup filled out with beans and leaves.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Flavorful Soup
items.description: A rich soup built on a base of hamburger steak and Aspear Berry.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Simple Bread
items.description: A plain loaf baked from wheat, the most basic dish that powers up Cut.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Leppa Bread
items.description: A wheat loaf baked with a Leppa Berry folded in.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Carrot Bread
items.description: A wheat loaf baked with fresh carrot.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Recycled Bread
items.description: A loaf baked from leftover bread using the Recycle specialty.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen; requires the Recycle specialty.

items.name: Fluffy Bread
items.description: A soft wheat loaf baked with Pecha Berry using the Water specialty.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen; requires the Water specialty.

items.name: Bread Bowl
items.description: A wheat loaf hollowed out and filled with simple soup, baked with the Burn specialty.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen; requires the Burn specialty.

items.name: Simple Hamburger Steak
items.description: A plain bean-based steak, the most basic dish that powers up Rock Smash.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Mushroom Hamburger Steak
items.description: A bean steak folded with cave mushrooms.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Tomato Hamburger Steak
items.description: A bean steak topped with fresh tomato.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Potato Hamburger Steak
items.description: A bean steak served alongside potato.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Bitter Hamburger Steak
items.description: A bean steak seasoned with Rawst and Lum Berries.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Vibrant Hamburger Steak
items.description: A bean steak served with a side of simple salad and potato.
items.obtainDetail: Cooked at the kitchen.

items.name: Afternoon Tea Set
items.description: A tea set favored as a gift by Eevee-line Pokémon.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Chocolate Cookies
items.description: A batch of cookies favored as a gift by Eevee-line Pokémon.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Common Candy
items.description: A simple candy handed out by Chef Dente.
items.obtainDetail: Given by Chef Dente.

items.name: Bruised Berry
items.description: A slightly bruised berry given out by Chef Dente.
items.obtainDetail: Given by Chef Dente.

items.name: Acrylic Poster
items.description: A printed acrylic poster for personalizing a room's walls.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Balloon Poster
items.description: A poster printed with a balloon motif.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Ditto Rug
items.description: A floor rug printed with a smiling Ditto face, sold in Withered Wasteland.
items.obtainDetail: Withered Wasteland shop, Environment Level 7.

items.name: Charizard Rug
items.description: A floor rug printed with a fire-breathing Charizard design.
items.obtainDetail: Obtained through an uncommon, unconfirmed method.
items.notes: Obtain method uncertain — sources only mark this item as "other."

items.name: Book
items.description: A small printed book that can be displayed on a shelf.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Book Pile
items.description: A loose stack of books left scattered on the ground.
items.obtainDetail: Found in the overworld.

items.name: Bookcase
items.description: A shelving case built to display a collection of books.
items.obtainDetail: Found in the overworld or included in a build kit.

items.name: Corkboard
items.description: A corkboard for pinning up photos and notes.
items.obtainDetail: Found in the overworld or sold in shops.

items.name: Diploma
items.description: A framed diploma awarded for completing the Pokédex.
items.obtainDetail: Awarded for Pokédex completion.

items.name: Crystal Ball
items.description: A fortune-telling crystal ball earned after a quest involving a Poliwrath.
items.obtainDetail: Awarded after completing a Poliwrath quest.

items.name: Clear Bell
items.description: A bell item used to call on Ho-Oh after befriending it.
items.obtainDetail: Given after befriending a legendary Pokémon; also sold in shops.

items.name: Castform Weather Charm
items.description: A reversible Castform doll that flips between weather forms.
items.obtainDetail: Found on the Dream Islands or sold in shops.

items.name: Ditto Flag
items.description: A flag marking a player's house, earned from a picnic quest.
items.obtainDetail: Awarded from a picnic quest.

items.name: Picnic Basket
items.description: A woven picnic basket assembled from a sturdy stick and vine rope.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.

items.name: Concrete Pipe
items.description: A length-adjustable concrete pipe used to route water or paths.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted from concrete.

items.name: Canoe
items.description: A small canoe for paddling across open water.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Alarm Clock
items.description: A loud alarm clock sold at the Bleak Beach shop.
items.obtainDetail: Bleak Beach shop.

items.name: Cell Phone
items.description: A cell phone prop for a modern-styled room.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Computer
items.description: A laboratory computer used as a room prop.
items.obtainDetail: Found in the overworld or included in a build kit.

items.name: Arcade Machine
items.description: A vintage arcade cabinet for a game-room build.
items.obtainDetail: Obtained through an uncommon, unconfirmed method.
items.notes: Obtain method uncertain — sources only mark this item as "other."

items.name: Audio Mixer
items.description: A DJ mixer prop for a music-themed room.
items.obtainDetail: Sold in shops or as a rotating daily special.

items.name: Bathtub
items.description: A tub for soaking, sized for a bathroom build.
items.obtainDetail: Found in the overworld, sold in shops, or included in a build kit.

items.name: Cool Bass Guitar
items.description: An electric bass guitar earned after the Strange Strings quest.
items.obtainDetail: Awarded after completing the Strange Strings quest.

items.name: Cool Electric Guitar
items.description: An electric guitar earned after the Strange Strings quest.
items.obtainDetail: Awarded after completing the Strange Strings quest.

items.name: Gaming PC
items.description: A gaming PC assembled from Pokemetal and glass panels.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench.

items.name: Seat
items.description: A generic stand-in for any seat-type furniture, from a rustic log chair to a padded office chair.
items.obtainDetail: Most seat furniture (Log Chair, Straw Stool, Office Chair, Beach Chair, etc.) is crafted at the workbench once its recipe is learned; a few variants are found pre-placed or bought instead.
items.notes: Generic habitat placeholder covering any seat-category furniture piece, not one specific item.

items.name: Tall Grass
items.description: The standard green tufts of grass that form the simplest habitat in the game.
items.obtainDetail: Use Leafage on grass or soil terrain to grow a new patch; naturally found around Withered Wasteland. Rototiller picks up and relocates existing patches.

items.name: Wildflowers
items.description: A cluster of small, colorful flowers grown on freshly tilled dirt.
items.obtainDetail: Buy Wildflower Seeds from the PC Shop, till soil with Rototiller, plant, and water with Water Gun; grows readily in Withered Wasteland, which is available from the start.

items.name: Fishing Rod
items.description: A rod used to fish ponds and coastal water for aquatic materials and Pokémon.
items.obtainDetail: Purchase from the PC Shop after reaching Environment Level 3 in Palette Town; also obtainable as an Ancient Artifact when Professor Tangrowth appraises a Large Lost Relic.
items.notes: A workbench craft recipe is also implied by other placeable items, but its specific ingredients aren't confirmed across sources.

items.name: Plated Food
items.description: A prepared dish set out on a plate as an offering rather than eaten immediately.
items.obtainDetail: Likely a cooked dish plated for display at grave and weather-charm offerings; the exact recipe or kitchen requirement isn't documented.
items.notes: Obtain method uncertain — sources describe its use in habitats (Grave Offering, Sunny Day Site, Rain Dance Site) but not how to obtain it.

items.name: Gravestone
items.description: A weathered stone marker used to build quiet, memorial-themed habitats.
items.obtainDetail: Found on a cliff south of the Withered Wasteland Pokémon Center, alongside a wooden plate and a candle. Later duplicable via the Pokémon Center's 3D Printer using a reference photo and Pokémetal; also sold by some vendors.

items.name: Large Palm Tree
items.description: A tall, tropical palm tree that shades beachfront habitats.
items.obtainDetail: Grown from a Palm Seed, obtained by chopping down existing palm trees around Bleak Beach (also found on Ocean Dream Island); plant and grow like other large trees.

items.name: Seashore Flowers
items.description: Salt-tolerant flowers that grow naturally along sandy coastlines.
items.obtainDetail: Buy Seashore Flower Seeds from the PC Shop, till soil with Rototiller, plant, and water with Water Gun; also grows wild and can be picked directly along Bleak Beach.

items.name: Moss
items.description: A patch of damp, spreading moss that grows over ground and rock alike.
items.obtainDetail: Found growing on damp, shaded ground and boulders in Rocky Ridges; picked up directly rather than crafted.

items.name: Hedge
items.description: A trimmed row of shrubbery used to box in gardens and coastal plots.
items.obtainDetail: Found growing wild by region and variant: Adorable Hedge in Withered Wasteland, Healthy Hedge around Bleak Beach, Damp Hedge in Rocky Ridges, and Stylish Hedge in Sparkling Skylands. Each variant also appears on its matching Dream Island.
items.notes: Region varies by hedge color/variant; 'hedge' habitat requirements accept any style.

items.name: Table
items.description: A generic stand-in for any table-type furniture, from a cut log to a stone-and-iron side table.
items.obtainDetail: Most table furniture (Log Table, Straw Table, Side Table, Garden Table, etc.) is crafted at the workbench once its recipe is learned; a few variants are found pre-placed instead.
items.notes: Generic habitat placeholder covering any table-category furniture piece, not one specific item.

items.name: Metal Drum
items.description: A rusty barrel that gives outdoor and industrial-themed spots a worn, junkyard feel.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench from Iron Ore once the recipe is learned; the recipe can be found by inspecting glowing water spots, from the daily PC Shop rotation, or from Dream Island Poké Balls.

items.name: Bed
items.description: A generic stand-in for any bed-type furniture, from a simple log frame to a luxury bed.
items.obtainDetail: Most bed furniture (Log Bed, Iron Bed, Luxury Bed, etc.) is crafted at the workbench once its recipe is learned; some regional variants are bought from shops instead.
items.notes: Generic habitat placeholder covering any bed-category furniture piece, not one specific item.

items.name: Slender Candle
items.description: A tall, plain candle that lights up graveside and nighttime habitat setups.
items.obtainDetail: Purchase from the PC Shop after reaching Environment Level 2 in Withered Wasteland; also craftable at the workbench once the recipe is found via glowing water spots, the daily PC Shop rotation, or Dream Island Poké Balls.

items.name: Log Chair
items.description: A short section of log left as a simple, rustic seat.
items.obtainDetail: Found as a pre-placed object, including on Dream Islands, or crafted at the workbench once the recipe is learned.

items.name: Large Tree
items.description: A generic stand-in for any full-grown large tree, whose species varies by region.
items.obtainDetail: Grown from a tree seed collected by chopping down an existing large tree (which drops seeds, Small Logs, and Leaves); seed variety depends on region, e.g. Pointy Tree seeds from Rocky Ridges and Sparkling Skylands.
items.notes: Generic habitat placeholder — any large tree species satisfies the requirement.

items.name: Large Boulder
items.description: A hefty boulder heavy enough to give Fighting- and Rock-type Pokémon somewhere to spar or rest.
items.obtainDetail: Occurs naturally as a terrain feature rather than being crafted; to place additional copies, photograph one with the camera's reference mode at a Pokémon Center 3D Printer and exchange Pokémetal to print a duplicate.
items.notes: Exact natural spawn locations are not confirmed across sources; sourced guides focus on duplicating, moving, and breaking it rather than where it first appears.

items.name: Berry Tree
items.description: A generic stand-in for any fruiting berry tree, which yields up to three berries before needing to regrow.
items.obtainDetail: Grown from berry seeds found around the map: Leppa seeds are widely available; Chesto near Smearguru's hut in Bleak Beach; Rawst in a hidden room on Sparkling Skylands' northwest island; Aspear near Bleak Beach's waterfall; Pecha in the Rocky Ridges lava cave's crystal area; Lum near a lava waterfall east of the Rocky Ridges museum. Chopping down a grown tree (including the stump) yields seeds again.
items.notes: Generic habitat placeholder — any berry tree variety satisfies the requirement.

items.name: Straw Stool
items.description: A low stool with a woven straw seat, sized for small Pokémon.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench; the recipe is found on the hill west of the Withered Wasteland Pokémon Center.

items.name: Windmill Kit
items.description: A pre-built windmill structure that turns wind into usable power.
items.obtainDetail: Obtained by progressing the Bleak Beach storyline; later purchasable from the PC Shop, and also found by breaking Glowing Spots.

items.name: Dry Tall Grass
items.description: A parched-looking variant of tall grass grown without any water.
items.obtainDetail: Use Leafage on unwatered, dry soil (ground untouched by Water Gun or rain) to grow a patch; Rototiller picks it up and relocates it.

items.name: Smooth Rock
items.description: An oddly smooth stone that seems to sap the life from nearby plants.
items.obtainDetail: Picked up in the cave where Onix is found trapped in Withered Wasteland; also a possible reward from Gimmighoul in exchange for an appraised Lost Relic, Rainbow Feather, or Silver Feather.

items.name: Mossy Boulder
items.description: A large boulder thickly covered in moss that won't peel away.
items.obtainDetail: A fixed boulder already present in the hot springs cave in Rocky Ridges; the Mossy Boulder habitat is built by placing Moss around it rather than moving or crafting a new one.

items.name: Stalagmites
items.description: Pale mineral spires that jut up from a limestone cavern floor.
items.obtainDetail: Found naturally in Rocky Ridges' limestone caverns.

items.name: Wooden Crate
items.description: A simple slatted crate used for stacking and storage-themed decor.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench once the recipe is learned via glowing water spots, the daily PC Shop rotation, or Dream Island Poké Balls; also found pre-placed in Withered Wasteland, Bleak Beach, and Rocky Ridges.

items.name: Lantern
items.description: A portable light source used to brighten cave and outdoor habitats.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench; also found pre-placed in Rocky Ridges.

items.name: Firepit
items.description: A ring-lined pit for containing an open flame outdoors.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench once the recipe is learned via glowing water spots or the daily PC Shop rotation.

items.name: Furnace
items.description: An industrial smelting furnace whose radiant heat also draws in Fire-type Pokémon.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench from Iron Ore and Stone; the recipe unlocks after picking up an Iron Ingot for the first time. Needs a power connection, from a windmill or a Generate-specialty Pokémon, to run.
items.notes: Identified with the Smelting Furnace item used for ore processing; not confirmed as a separate 'Furnace' decor object.

items.name: Stone Fireplace
items.description: A built-in stone hearth that warms a cozy indoor nap spot.
items.obtainDetail: Recipe automatically unlocks after registering 120 Pokémon in the Pokédex; craft at the workbench. Also purchasable from the PC Shop after reaching Environment Level 5 in Sparkling Skylands, or found in Dream Island Poké Balls.

items.name: Yellow Tall Grass
items.description: A yellow-tinted tall grass variant tied to Bleak Beach's coastal color palette.
items.obtainDetail: Found naturally around Bleak Beach, and on Pikachu Doll Dream Island; new patches can be grown with Leafage on matching terrain.

items.name: Red Tall Grass
items.description: A deep red tall grass variant tied to Rocky Ridges' mountainous terrain.
items.obtainDetail: Found naturally around Rocky Ridges, and on Clefairy Doll Dream Island; new patches can be grown with Leafage on matching terrain.

items.name: Pink Tall Grass
items.description: A soft pink tall grass variant tied to the floating Sparkling Skylands.
items.obtainDetail: Found naturally around Sparkling Skylands, and on Dragonite Doll Dream Island; new patches can be grown with Leafage on matching terrain.

items.name: Waste Bin
items.description: A small trash bin used to dress up urban and refuse-themed habitats.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench once the recipe (hidden under clay blocks at Bleak Beach) is learned; also found pre-placed around town, e.g. beside the Bleak Beach workbench.

items.name: Sign
items.description: A generic stand-in for any placeable signpost used to label a spot like a trash collection site.
items.obtainDetail: Sourcing not clearly documented; likely found or crafted similarly to other trash-site props.
items.notes: Obtain method uncertain — sources confirm it as a Trash Collection Site component but don't detail how to acquire it.

items.name: Garbage Bags
items.description: A bundle of bagged trash piled up as urban Poison-type bait.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench once the recipe is learned via glowing water spots or the daily PC Shop rotation.

items.name: Garbage Bin
items.description: A larger trash bin, several of which hum with static when lined up together.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench once the recipe (hidden under clay blocks at Bleak Beach) is learned.

items.name: Streetlight
items.description: A generic stand-in for any streetlight variant, used to light urban and factory-themed habitats.
items.obtainDetail: Most variants (Mushroom, Town, Harbor, Chic, Double Streetlight) are crafted at the workbench; some are also found pre-placed, e.g. Town Streetlight north of Withered Wasteland or Harbor Streetlight around Bleak Beach.
items.notes: Generic habitat placeholder — any streetlight variant satisfies the requirement.

items.name: Control Unit
items.description: An industrial console prop themed around an abandoned power facility.
items.obtainDetail: A pre-built copy sits on the island northeast of the Sparkling Skylands Pokémon Center; a build kit is also found inside the Abandoned Power Plant. Otherwise, the craft recipe can turn up via glowing water spots or the daily PC Shop rotation.

items.name: Jumbled Cords
items.description: A tangled snarl of electrical cords left over from an abandoned factory floor.
items.obtainDetail: Found inside the meteor crater room; also purchasable from the PC Shop after reaching Environment Level 5 in Palette Town, or via a craft recipe found through glowing water spots or the daily PC Shop rotation.

items.name: Eerie Candle
items.description: A candle burning with an unsettling blue flame, used for creepier graveside offerings.
items.obtainDetail: An Ancient Artifact obtained randomly when Professor Tangrowth appraises a Large Lost Relic dug up from a glowing spot; not craftable.

items.name: Doll
items.description: A generic stand-in for any plush doll, used both as bedside decor and as a Drifloon travel token.
items.obtainDetail: Obtained by using Rock Smash on glowing blocks; each specific doll (Pikachu, Arcanine, Dragonite, etc.) can also be handed to Drifloon to reach that doll's matching Dream Island.
items.notes: Generic habitat placeholder — any doll satisfies the requirement.

items.name: Cart
items.description: A small wooden hauling cart that evokes an active logging site.
items.obtainDetail: Recipe automatically unlocks after registering 70 Pokémon in the Pokédex, then craft at the workbench; also purchasable from the PC Shop after reaching Environment Level 4 in Withered Wasteland.

items.name: Tree Stump
items.description: A generic stand-in for any felled tree's stump, left over after harvesting a large tree.
items.obtainDetail: Left behind after felling a Large Tree with Cut; chopping the stump two or three more times breaks it and drops 1-3 seeds depending on the tree type.
items.notes: Generic habitat placeholder — the stump variety (Leppa, Palm, Pointy, etc.) matches whichever tree was felled.

items.name: Log Bed
items.description: A rustic bed frame built from small logs.
items.obtainDetail: Found as a pre-placed object or crafted at the workbench once the recipe is learned.

items.name: Berry Basket
items.description: A woven basket piled with gathered berries for an outdoor feast.
items.obtainDetail: Crafted at the workbench; the recipe is purchasable from the PC Shop after reaching Environment Level 4 in Withered Wasteland.
